-type bomb struct%7B%0A    x int%0A    y int%0A    raio int%0A%7D%0Afunc main() %7B%0An := 0%0Afmt.Scan(&n)%0Abomba:= make(%5B%5Dbomb, n)%0Afor i:=0;i%3Cn;i++%7B%0A    fmt.Scan(&bomba%5Bi%5D.x,&bomba%5Bi%5D.y,&bomba%5Bi%5D.raio)%0A%7D%0A%0A%7D%0Afunc buildgraph(bombas %5B%5Dbomb)%5B%5D%5B%5Dint%7B%0A    k := len(bombas)%0A    graph := make(%5B%5D%5B%5Dint, k)%0A    for i:= 0; i%3C k; i++%7B%0A        for j:=0; j%3C k; j++%7B%0A            l :=bombas%5Bi%5D.y - bombas%5Bj%5D.y%0A            o:=bombas%5Bi%5D.x- bombas%5Bj%5D.x %0A            dq:= (l*l)+(o*o)%0A            rq :=bombas%5Bi%5D.raio * bombas%5Bi%5D.raio%0A%0A            if dq %3C= rq%7B%0A                graph%5Bi%5D = append(graph%5Bi%5D,j)%0A            %7D%0A        %7D%0A    %7D%0A    return graph
